title: Jejak Waktu di Dinding Rumah
theme: Mengeksplorasi kembali ikatan kekeluargaan dan menemukan titik temu antara tradisi lama dengan pandangan hidup baru, mempererat hubungan ibu dan anak melalui pemahaman mendalam.

cover.prompt: An old, weathered childhood home under the soft, warm light of late afternoon. Its walls, once bright, now show gentle yellowing and subtle peeling paint, conveying a sense of enduring history. A lone, contemplative figure stands quietly at a distance, observing the house from a calm pathway. The composition emphasizes the home's character and the atmosphere of nostalgic reflection, with a focus on environmental details and the gentle interplay of light and texture.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Rara returns to her childhood home, clashing with her mother over modernizing the old house. The discovery of hidden markings on a wall reveals deep family history and her father's legacy, leading to a profound understanding and reconciliation between mother and daughter, blending tradition with new perspectives.
meta.target_emotion: Nostalgia, empathy, warmth, understanding, peaceful optimism.
